compiled_state.title: E2.3: port list-descendants in-process
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Port list-descendants (BFS-by-type) to rebar._engine_support.descendants.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Dispatches in-process via _DESCENDANTS (full auto-init)
- [ ] Dual-run parity python==bash (epic/story/task/miss/arity), exact usage string
- [ ] No bash deleted (parity-pinned 2nd impl until E7/E8)

comments.body: DONE (commit d81650ab). Ported to rebar._engine_support.descendants reusing reduce_all_tickets+resolver, routed in-process via _DESCENDANTS. Dual-run parity green (epic/story/task/miss/arity), exact usage string preserved. Live smoke OK. No bash deleted.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
